name: crabmate-agent-demo
install:
set -euxo pipefail
apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libssh2-1-dev openssh-client openssh-server

# Node.js >= 22
if ! command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ "$(node -v | sed 's/^v//' | cut -d. -f1)" -lt 22 ]; then
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  apt-get install -y nodejs
fi
node -v
npm -v

# Rust (supports edition 2024 via Cargo.toml edition)
if ! command -v rustc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal
fi
export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"
rustup toolchain install stable --profile minimal -y
rustup default stable
rustup toolchain install nightly --profile minimal -y
rustc --version
cargo --version
rustc +nightly --version
